steps.eval: await (async () => { const deadline = Date.now() + (globalThis.__uxinspectWebhookTimeoutMs || 30000); const url = globalThis.__uxinspectWebhookUrl; if (!url) throw new Error('webhookCatcherUrl not configured'); while (Date.now() < deadline) { const res = await fetch(url, { cache: 'no-store' }); if (res.ok) { const body = await res.json().catch(() => null); if (body && (body.received || (Array.isArray(body) && body.length > 0))) return; } await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1000)); } throw new Error('webhook not received within timeout'); })()
